zh.lifeSummary: 當William Stanley於1250年出生在英國爾胡頓時，他的父親Sir Walter Stanley35歲，母親Margery de Hooton25歲。他於1282年9月27日與Joan de Bamville在英國爾阿斯特伯里結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1326年之前在英國爾阿斯特伯里，埋葬在英國爾阿斯特伯里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Stanley于1250年出生在英国爾胡頓时，他的父亲Sir Walter Stanley35岁，母亲Margery de Hooton25岁。他于1282年9月27日与Joan de Bamville在英国爾阿斯特伯里结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1326年之前在英国爾阿斯特伯里，埋葬在英国爾阿斯特伯里。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When William Stanley was born in 1250, in Hooton, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Walter Stanley, was 35 and his mother, Margery de Hooton, was 25. He married Joan de Bamville on 27 September 1282, in Astbury, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 1326, in Astbury, Cheshire, England, and was buried in Astbury, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Stanley est né en 1250, à Hooton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Walter Stanley, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margery de Hooton, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Bamville le 27 septembre 1282, à Astbury, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 1326, à Astbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Astbury, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Stanley 1250 in Hooton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Walter Stanley 35 und seine Mutter Margery de Hooton 25. Er hat am 27. September 1282 in Astbury, Cheshire, England Joan de Bamville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 1326 in Astbury, Cheshire, England und wurde in Astbury, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Stanley è nato il nel 1250 nel Hooton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Walter Stanley, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Margery de Hooton, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Bamville il 27 settembre 1282, nel Astbury, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 1326, nel Astbury, Cheshire, England, e fu sepolto a Astbury, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Stanleyが1250年にイギリスチェシュアイアホーオトンで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Stanleyは35歳，母Margery de Hootonは25歳であった。1282年9月27日にイギリスチェシュアイアアストブリーでJoan de Bamvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1326年以前にイギリスチェシュアイアアストブリーで死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアアストブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Stanley(이)가 1250년 영국 체실르 후턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter Stanley(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery de Hooton(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1282년 9월 27일 영국 체실르 애스트버이에서 Joan de Bamville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1326년 이전 영국 체실르 애스트버이에서 사망했으며 영국 체실르 애스트버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Stanley nasceu em 1250, em Hooton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Walter Stanley, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Hooton, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Bamville em 27 de setembro de 1282, em Astbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1326, em Astbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Astbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Stanley родился в 1250 г. в местности хутон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Walter Stanley было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery de Hooton, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Bamville 27 сентября 1282 г. в местности астбури, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 1326 г. в местности астбури, чешир, Англия и был похоронен в местности астбури, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Stanley nació en 1250, en Hooton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Walter Stanley, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margery de Hooton, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Joan de Bamville el 27 de septiembre de 1282, en Astbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 1326, en Astbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Astbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
